title: .Count accessed on potentially null or non-array ConvertFrom-Json result
description: PowerShell 5.1 ConvertFrom-Json returns $null for empty arrays and a bare object for single-element arrays. Accessing .Count on these under StrictMode throws 'property Count cannot be found'. Must always wrap with @() to force array context before .Count access. Already tracked as SIN-20260328090001-a1b2c3d4 but this formalises continuous scanning.
detection_method: Regex scan for ConvertFrom-Json result immediately followed by .Count without @() wrapping
preventionRule: Always wrap ConvertFrom-Json results with @() before accessing .Count or iterating. Pattern: @(... | ConvertFrom-Json).Count
remedy: Wrap the ConvertFrom-Json call in @(): @($json | ConvertFrom-Json).Count
